title: Allspice Butter Egg Delight
description: A buttery, creamy dish with a touch of ground allspice and hints of warmth for kids to enjoy, egg-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: sugar
ingredients.notes: powdered or granulated, depending on preference

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine butter and vanilla extract. Mix until smooth.
Gradually add allspice ground to the mixture and mix well.
Slowly pour in milk or almond milk while continuously stirring with a wooden spoon to avoid splattering.
Stir in maple syrup and sugar. Continue mixing until all ingredients are well combined and there are no lumps left.
Transfer the mixture into a shallow baking dish or mug.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until set. Let cool slightly before serving.
